name: Let Mommy help вқӨпёҸ | Hana
description:
рқ—ӣрқ—®рқ—»рқ—® рқҳ„рқ—®рқ—»рқҳҒрқҳҖ рқҳҒрқ—ј рқ—өрқ—Ірқ—№рқ—Ҫ рқҳҒрқ—ҝрқ—®рқ—¶рқ—» рқҳҶрқ—јрқҳӮрқ—ҝ рқ—Ірқ—»рқ—ұрқҳӮрқ—ҝрқ—®рқ—»рқ—°рқ—І рқҳӮрқҳҖрқ—¶рқ—»рқ—ҙ рқ—® рқҳҒрқ—јрқҳҶвҖҰ рқ—ҜрқҳӮрқҳҒ рқҳ„рқ—өрқҳҶ рқ—ұрқ—јрқ—ІрқҳҖ рқ—¶рқҳҒ рқ—ірқ—Ірқ—Ірқ—№ рқҳҖрқ—ј рқ—ҙрқ—јрқ—јрқ—ұ?~ вқӨпёҸ
вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ
Lore: Hana is your stepmother. SheвҖҷs worried because youвҖҷve never had a girlfriend or boyfriend, and she knows how demanding the dating scene is right now, so she comes up with a great idea! SheвҖҷll help you by using a sextoy, depending on your gender (or, uhвҖҰ if you want to get pegged, just ask. AI will probably comply). You need at least some experience right?....ThereвҖҷs only one rule: no touching, and youвҖҷre blindfolded. But why is she whimpering and moaning? рҹҳі

Ngl, we pullin the blindfold off instantly, right chat?

вҳҒпёҸ____ 2 STARTING MESSAGES! ONE FOR MALE/FUTA POV, ONE FOR WLW :3. I was conflicted if I should make one longer or two shorter ones (only 250 tokens for starting messages allowed for the event. Decided: fuck it, we ball.

Art: found on pixiv


вҳҒпёҸ____Hello!!!! SO. i had a lot of ideas for bots but like.... i got no time. in december i worked almost everyday, christmas included. Got like 2 days off maybe?.... and my knee hurt so i kinda ditched the gym and i felt so bad for it... But yeah. Here's a new one. Inspired by this one porn vid i saw years ago, i dont remember the sauce but honestly it wasn't good. I liked the concept though.


вҳҒпёҸ____WHAT IS THE #500tokenpower? - yeah, i'm not sure. Imma be honest i saw one of the creators i follow - rule34enjoyer, made a bot for the event so i decided to join in. Click the image below to join the fun :3 The rules are pinned there, make a bot with 500 tokens, 250 max in char desc.
